'''Dancer''' was the nickname given by [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] to her own [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droid]]. This [[Droid/Legends|droid]] was used aboard the [[T-65XJ3 X-wing starfighter|XJ3 X-wing]] she flew as part of [[Saber Squadron (Eclipse)|Saber Squadron]].

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]'' {{1st}}
